metadata.title: Pavel Telitsyn — Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Portfolio and links of Pavel Telitsyn, Full Stack Developer. Freelance web development on Fiverr and Upwork.

hero.description: I'm a Full Stack Developer based in Pavlodar. I build websites and web apps end-to-end — from design to deploy.

stack.title: Stack
stack.frontend: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, TanStack Query, Zustand
stack.backend: Node.js, Next.js (API Routes, Server Actions), PostgreSQL, Prisma

hero.title: My Journey
hero.subtitle: Passion for technology from a young age.

childhood.title: From the very beginning
childhood.description: I got introduced to IT in my early childhood. Studying at the 'Step' Computer Academy, I eagerly absorbed knowledge across various fields: programming, design, video editing, and robotics. This built a rock-solid foundation and a deep understanding of how technology works at all levels. My experience isn't just a couple of bootcamps—I've lived this from a young age, meaning you can fully rely on my technical expertise.

studies.title: Formal Education & Continuous Growth
studies.description: I graduated with a degree in Computer Science Education from KAZGUU (Astana). This background gave me a strong structural foundation and the ability to break down complex technical concepts into simple terms. However, the tech world never stops evolving, so I focused heavily on deep self-education. I've completed intensive programs on Coursera and continually master new technologies and best practices. Lifelong learning is the core of my professional approach.

work.title: Commercial Experience & Freelance
work.description: I started my journey in commercial development with orders on Upwork and creating projects for local businesses in my city. I am currently active as a freelancer and planning to expand my horizons. My main specialization is building modern websites and web applications from scratch. I handle the entire lifecycle: from the initial idea and design to writing robust code and deploying the final product.
